§7Guide Book #43§r
§lSkeleton Footman§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Skeleton, Undead, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All overworld surfaces, Underground.
•§lHealth§r: 20

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Bone, Leather Scrap, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Cave Wolf, Creepers, Wolf.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Villagers, Player's aggressive

tamed mobs.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Wooden Sword
•§lEquipped armor§r: Leather Armor
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 3
•Can burn in daylight.
•Can pick up weapons and equip it.
•Can pick up armor and equip it.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Clad in tattered leather and clutching crude weapons, the Skeleton Footman is the risen remnant of forgotten infantry, cursed to patrol the overworld once more.
